
# About Me

I am a graduate student in Applied Data Analytics with interests in data-driven decision-making, machine learning, business analytics, and data visualization. My academic work has focused on analyzing job market trends, building predictive models, and presenting findings through clear visualizations and professional reports.

My technical experience includes Python, SQL, Spark, AWS, machine learning, and data visualization tools. I am especially interested in applying analytics to real-world business problems and building projects that connect technical skills with strategic insight.

My career goal is to work in a role where I can combine analytical thinking, technical tools, and business communication to support data-informed decisions. I currently work at a financial institution, as a financial
